description_long: This shotgun features a robust, compact design with a dark, matte finish and a distinctive, contoured grip that appears ergonomic and textured for secure handling. The barrel is relatively short and blocky, with a squared-off muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting, suggesting a tactical or urban-oriented configuration. The receiver is boxy and merges seamlessly with the barrel, while the trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The grip is sculpted with pronounced finger grooves, enhancing control and comfort during use. There is no visible stock, giving the weapon a more compact, maneuverable profile suitable for close-quarters environments. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of modern tactical shotguns.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a short barrel, contoured grip, and no visible stock, finished in dark matte tones. The design emphasizes maneuverability and secure handling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded muzzle and the contoured grip profile beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the short, blocky barrel, boxy receiver, and sculpted grip with finger grooves.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the length of the grip and the absence of a stock, with the barrel aligned forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same compact barrel and ergonomic grip, with the trigger guard visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and blocky with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no reinforcement
